# Technology Consultants

> A consulting practice run by builders. We design, build, and operate React web applications and AI agents for startups, SMBs, and mid-market teams.

## Services & Resources
- [React & Full-Stack Web Development](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/services/react-web-development) — Dedicated service page detailing stack, type safety, SLAs, and engineering workflow.
- [AI Agent Consulting](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/services/ai-agent-consulting) — Detailed service page covering LLM pipelines, prompt caching, human-in-the-loop, and MCP.
- [What is an AI Agent? (Guide)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/resources/what-is-an-ai-agent) — Educational resource explaining autonomous planning, memory, and validation architectures.

## Packages & Pricing
- [Pricing Specifications](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing.md) — Machine-readable pricing for all packages.
- [Packages & Pricing page](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing) — Full human-readable detail on every package below.
- [Found & Ordered](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing#found-and-ordered) (2 - 4 weeks, from $395) — AEO/SEO-ready website with optional direct POS ordering integration. Best for restaurants and local businesses.
- [Never Miss a Call](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing#never-miss-a-call) (2 - 4 weeks) — Voice AI phone answering that pushes orders/bookings into POS or CRM. Best for any business losing revenue to missed calls.
- [Paperwork Autopilot](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing#paperwork-autopilot) (2 - 4 weeks) — Document/contract intake pipeline with automated extraction and human review on ambiguous cases. Best for real estate and professional services.
- [Enterprise & Multi-Site Systems](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/pricing#enterprise) (custom scope, 12+ weeks) — Unified CMS, navigation, and shared systems across multiple brands or subsidiaries. Best for corporate groups.

## Founder Credentials
- **Roberto Guido**: Founder & Principal Engineer. BS Electrical Engineering (UC San Diego), MBA (NYU Stern).
- Experienced in voice AI design (Encounter AI), 2024 Technical Resident in AI or Cybersecurity (TRAC) at Colorwave, and enterprise integrations with Workday Finance & Workday Adaptive Planning.

## Portfolio & Production Products
- **Appt Helper** ([appthelper.com](https://appthelper.com)) — 24/7 monitor and instant SMS alerts for Global Entry & SENTRI slots.
- **Open Cita** ([opencita.com](https://opencita.com)) — Spanish localized monitor engine for Trusted Traveler program.
- **Border Bills** — Utility payment app for Mexican bills from the US.
- **Baja Care** — Intake & discovery platform for vetted healthcare providers in Baja California.

## Spanish / Localization (Mexican Spanish)
- [Inicio en Español](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/) — Localized home page.
- [Desarrollo Web React (ES)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/services/react-web-development) — React consulting in Spanish.
- [Consultoría de Agentes de IA (ES)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/services/ai-agent-consulting) — AI agent consulting in Spanish.
- [¿Qué es un Agente de IA? (ES)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/resources/what-is-an-ai-agent) — Spanish version of our AI Agent guide.
